description: Provider credentialing + Council vetting record. G5 STRUCTURAL: medicalLicenseCiteCid + ≥3 Council Lv6+ DID attestations + ≥1 licensed-MD on Council medical advisory. G14 STRUCTURAL: providers are vocation-flow L5 stewards per Liberation Ladder L0..L6 (lLevel=L5 + employmentRelation=vocation-flow; cross-actor enforcement with chigiri.stewardLaborAttestation). External employment parallel relationships tracked in chigiri.stewardLaborAttestation.externalEmployerDid (NOT here).

providerNameEncryptedCid.description: ADR-2605181100 encrypted envelope CID containing provider real name + credentials (PII; not exposed publicly)

medicalLicenseCiteCid.description: G5 REQUIRED: citation to provider's state-issued medical license; iyashi does NOT issue credentials, only attests vetting

councilAttestations.description: G5 REQUIRED: ≥3 distinct Council Lv6+ DIDs vetting this provider

medicalAdvisoryMdDid.description: G5 REQUIRED: ≥1 licensed-MD on Council medical advisory who attested this provider

lLevel.description: G14 STRUCTURAL: providers are L5 vocation-flow stewards per Liberation Ladder. Cross-actor enforcement with chigiri.stewardLaborAttestation.

employmentRelation.description: G14 STRUCTURAL: providers are vocation-flow stewards; NOT employees; chigiri.stewardLaborAttestation.employmentRelation enum DELIBERATELY excludes employee.

publicFundVocationGrantCid.description: Optional: Public Fund vocation grant CID (one-time setup OR ongoing)
